subcodes.first_line: O manifestation of mystic knowledge! The contingent world is filled with loss and deprivation and denial, and its end is naught but infinite regret [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مظهر عرفان امکان جهانیست پر زیان و خسران و حرمان پایانش حسرت بی پایان مگر
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @being a source of light; guidance
